titleStmt.title: SII 8.693: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 693. (A.R. No. 379 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa
tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattika
ḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yā
ṇṭu 2 10 9vatu kaṟkaṭa
kanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tra
yoteciyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum pe
ṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ teṉka
rai Irācakempiravaḷanāṭṭu U
ṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu Allūr Uṭai
yār tirunakkiśvara muṭaiya nāya
ṉār koyilil Āticaṇṭeśva
ratevar kaṉmikaḷukku Ivvūril
viranārāyaṇapurattu viyāpāri
kaḷil perumaṉṟūr kiḻavaṉ muta
li vicaiyapālan tiruvāṉaikkā
vuṭaiyārāṉa vicaiyapālaṉeṉ
nila tāṉa pramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu . Iv
vūril Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa nattattil nā
ṉ tāṉamākak kuṭutta nilattukku E
llai Āvatu . kiḻpāṟkellai ceṭṭikaḷ
teruvil meṟtalaiyil piḷḷaiyārko
yilil tiruvācalukku kiḻakku tāṟko
l taṟaikku meṟku mipāṟkellai I
ṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉattukkuk kiḻakku te
ṉpāṟkellai piḷḷaiyārkoyiluk
kuc cevvaikku vaṭakku vaṭapāṟkellai
piṭāri maṇṭakamuṭaiyāḷ koyilu
kkut m(e)ṟku Iṉṉāṉku Ellaikkuḷ naṭu
vupaṭṭa nilamum ceṭṭikaḷteruvi
l vaṭakkil puḻakkaṭai vālniḷattu
nāṉ tāṉaṅkuṭutta nilattukku Ellai
āvatu . kiḻpāṟkellai melai tiruve
ṇṇāval mayakkal nilattu melaiva
rampu peṟṟa cevvaikku meṟku
teṉpāṟkellai Iṉṉāyaṉār teva
tāṉattu viḷai nilattukkut teṟku Eḻa
raikkol niḷattukku vaṭakku mel
pāṟkellai Eṅkaḷ pitākkaḷ Iṉṉā
yaṉāṟkuk kuṭutta tevatāṉama ta
Ellai nilattukkuk kiḻakku vaṭapāṟ
kellai Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉamāṉa
viḷainilattukkut teṟku Iṉṉāṉ
kellaikkuḷḷu naṭuvupaṭṭa nilamum
Innilaṅkaḷil kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇa
ṟum melnokkiṉa maramum potu
vum potuvāriyum pākamum pākāciri
yamum maṟṟu meṟpeṟpaṭṭa Urimaika
ḷum Uḷpaṭa Utakam pūrvva māka tāṉam
paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Āticaṇṭeśva
ra tevar kaṉmikaḷukku Intat tiruvā
ṉaikkāvuṭaiyāṉāṉa vicaiyapāla
ṉeṉ . Ippaṭikku Ivai vicaiyapālaṉ
Eḻuttu . Ivar colla Inta tāṉapramāṇa
Icaivutiṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ koṭṭaiyūru
ṭaiyāṉ civalokamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 8.693 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
